name: Subhumans
description: '''Subhumans''' are an English/UK [[punk rock]] band formed in the [[Warminster]] and [[Melksham]] areas of [[Wiltshire]] in 1980. Singer [[Dick Lucas (singer)|Dick Lucas]] had formerly been in another local band, the Mental, and other members had been in The Stupid Humans. The band's musical style is typically classified as [[hardcore punk]] or [[anarcho-punk]].
